title: ICAI Expands Mandatory Applicability of Audit Quality Maturity Model (AQMM) Version 2.0
content:
# ICAI Expands Mandatory Applicability of Audit Quality Maturity Model (AQMM) Version 2.0

Ek important update hai for all Chartered Accountant firms! The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne Audit Quality Maturity Model (AQMM) Version 2.0 ki mandatory applicability ka scope extend kar diya hai. This is a significant step towards enhancing audit quality and governance in the profession.

Here’s a quick rundown of the key changes:

*   **Initial Applicability:** Previously, AQMM was mandatory for firms auditing listed entities, specific banks (excluding most co-operative banks), and insurance companies. Firms performing only branch audits were exempt.
*   **Widened Scope from April 1, 2026:**
    *   Ab AQMM un firms par bhi mandatory hoga jo listed entities, specified banks, aur insurance companies ki holding, subsidiary, associate, ya joint venture companies ki audit karte hain. Branch audits ab bhi exempt rahengi.
    *   Additionally, it will apply to firms undertaking statutory audits of large unlisted public companies. These are defined by thresholds of:
        *   Paid-up capital of ₹500 crore or more, or
        *   Annual turnover of ₹1,000 crore or more, or
        *   Aggregate outstanding loans, debentures, and deposits of ₹500 crore or more as on March 31st of the preceding financial year.
*   **Future Expansion (April 1, 2027 onwards):** The scope will further expand to include firms auditing entities that have raised more than ₹50 crore from the public, banks, or financial institutions during the review period, and other public interest entities.
*   **Increased Transparency:** ICAI ne decide kiya hai ki firms ke AQMM levels unki website par publicly available honge aur Peer Review Certificates par bhi print kiye jayenge. This move aims to bring greater transparency and trust.

This phased approach will allow firms to adapt and strengthen their audit quality processes, aligning with ICAI’s vision for improved audit standards across the board.

## Read the Official Document
* [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icai.org/notifications/)

*Published on: 11 April 2026*
